Replaced silent budgets[0] fallback in create_transaction & get_account_balance with shared _resolve_budget_id helper that elicits via ctx.elicit when multiple budgets exist; raises on ctx=None+multi-budget so the foot-gun is gone.
Implemented _resolve_category_id with elicitation; create_transaction prompts when category is None, no-match, or ambiguous. 11 new tests, 147 total pass.

Implemented confirm-before-post elicitation: _PostConfirmation schema, _confirm_create_transaction helper, confirm:bool=True kwarg, cancelled-marker dict on decline/cancel/false. 10 new tests; 157/157 pass.
Closed

Shipped data-layer-only piece of 6ha.2: Preferences pydantic model with 3 documented fields, load/save with env > json > defaults source order, atomic writes, and 22 unit tests. Diverged from bd description: used plain pydantic.BaseModel instead of pydantic-settings (per design decision in obs 2199 — three fields didn't justify the dependency). Wiring into YNABResources is intentionally deferred to 6ha.3, MCP get/set tools to 6ha.4.

Shipped YNABResources migration onto preferences.json + category_cache.json envelope with TTL. New: refresh_categories MCP tool, is_cache_stale helper, update_preferences validator-passthrough, one-shot legacy file migration (preferred_budget_id.json + budget_category_cache.json -> new layout, then unlink). Diverged from obs 2199 by keeping the cache in a separate file rather than folding into preferences.json — mixing a 3-field validated config with variable-size cache data is the wrong unit of validation/atomicity (advisor reconcile). Migrated cache entries get last_refreshed=None so is_cache_stale flags them on first read. 16 new tests + 1 legacy test updated to new envelope shape; full suite at 202 passing.

Shipped get_preferences + set_preference MCP tools and ynab://preferences resource. Extracted shared _coerce_field_value helper from env-overlay so both paths use one bool/int parser; helper returns None for empty strings on Optional fields (the documented way to clear default_budget_id). Verified FastMCP routes ynab://preferences and ynab://preferences/budget_id as distinct resources via mcp.read_resource. 9 new tests + bool grammar parametrized across 9 inputs; full suite at 219 passing. Held scope: did NOT wire confirm_before_post into create_transaction's elicitation logic — that open question (per-call param vs preference precedence) deferred to a follow-up issue.

Audit complete. Findings:
CANNOT implement via YNAB API v1: create_category (no endpoint), goal setting (SaveCategory has no goal fields), delete/update scheduled transactions (no endpoint).
CAN implement: update_category (rename/note/move groups), create_scheduled_transaction.
Filed htf.X issues for high-priority gaps.
Implemented update_category tool wrapping CategoriesApi.update_category(). Supports rename, note update, and move-to-group. 4 tests added to test_budgeting_core.py. All 247 tests pass.
Verified Code Mode examples are packaged under src/mcp_ynab/code_mode/examples.md, read via importlib.resources, present in the built wheel, and covered by focused tests.
Added read-only structured reconciliation profile and subset-match tools with unit coverage.
Added explicit Cleared column to transaction markdown outputs and tests for recent, attention, and category transaction views.
Implemented payee_id support for create_transaction and update_transaction, documented transfer payee workflow, and added regression tests.
Implemented Code Mode search/execute default-surface docs and regression coverage
Documented flipped Code Mode defaults and verified 2.0.0 default public surface
Implemented label-driven release workflows, version bumping, runtime version exposure, release docs, and package include cleanup.

Implemented create_scheduled_transaction tool wrapping ScheduledTransactionsApi.create_scheduled_transaction(). Supports all SaveScheduledTransaction fields; amount in dollars converted to milliunits; start_date defaults to today; frequency uses Literal type with all 13 valid values. 3 tests added to test_tools.py. 260 total tests pass.
Added 8 new tests: 6 for set_preference on code_mode_* fields (bool/float/int + validation bounds), 2 for _resolve_config_dir XDG_CONFIG_HOME and home fallback. 268 total tests pass.
Added any, all, abs, round, hasattr, isinstance to SAFE_BUILTINS. hasattr dunder-literal protection verified by existing audit. 12 new tests (10 parametrized + 2 targeted). 280 total tests pass.
Updated amount Field description to state negative=outflow/positive=inflow with examples. Added matching example sentence to docstring.
Added YNAB API v1 limitation notes to docstrings of get_categories (no create endpoint), update_category (goals are read-only), and get_scheduled_transactions (no update/delete endpoints).

Added elicitation to delete_transaction: fetches transaction summary (date, payee, amount, category), shows confirmation prompt via ctx.elicit, cancels if user declines or dismisses. 3 new tests for confirm/decline/dismiss paths. 283 total tests.

Migrated 4 categorize_transaction tests from inline DummyApi/DummyCtx to mock_ynab_apis fixture. Tests are now ~50% shorter. call_args uses kwargs since update_transaction is called with keyword args. All 283 tests pass.

Implemented ynab://payees/{budget_id} resource: PayeesApi fetch, deleted-payee filter, payees_cache in YNABResources, markdown table output. Fixed conftest PayeesApi monkeypatch. 4 tests added; 287 total pass.

Implementation already in place (server.py lines 231-317). Added test_code_mode_replace_tools_filters_instance_list_tools to pin the mcp.list_tools() path with replace_tools=True. Protocol handler and escape-hatch paths were already tested. 288 tests pass.
Added 4 workflow snippets: bulk approve, spending by category, triage uncategorized by payee, spending by payee. File is 4,971 bytes (under 8KB cap). Namespace regression test passes. 288 tests pass.

Wired confirm_before_post preference into create_transaction (both must be True) and delete_transaction (preference gates the elicitation block). Design: both must agree to confirm (preference AND per-call param). 2 tests added; 290 total pass.
Added ynab://categories/{budget_id}/current resource: live-fetch per-category budgeted/activity/balance with per-group markdown tables. Filters deleted categories. 4 tests added; 294 total pass.

Elicited from/to categories in move_money when IDs are omitted. Both params now Optional; ctx triggers category list elicitation from cache (refreshes API on miss). amount still required. 4 tests added; 298 total pass.
All 6 children closed (100%).
All 5 children closed (100%).

Improved _annotation_name (unwraps Annotated, renders Optional as T|None, handles list[T]/dict[K,V]). Added _field_description to extract FieldInfo.description. _format_tool_stub uses first-sentence docstrings and Args sections. build_spec doc field also truncated. Snapshot test + 9 targeted type-annotation tests added. Golden file at tests/stubs.golden.pyi (9.9KB from 16.4KB).

Implemented evals/run_dual_eval.py: dual-config runner (code_mode + direct_tools concurrent per eval), workspace iteration layout, timing.json. EvalRun extended with token + timing fields; DIRECT_TOOLS_SYSTEM + server_env_overrides + system_prompt wired through drive_prompt. 11 unit tests, 349 default suite green. intended_writes.json deferred to g57.3 (needs server-side dry-run mode).
